content:
Uranus in Virgo: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Uranus in Virgo blends the archetypal drive of Uranus (where you seek change, break rules, and awaken) with the Earth, mutable nature of Virgo.

  • Planet: Uranus — change, innovation, rebellion, awakening, freedom
  • Sign: Virgo (Earth/Mutable) — analysis, service, precision, health, craft

Eastern Perspective
